text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series has begun for Yaeno Muteki, a
runner trained in the Kongo Yaegaki style of
martial arts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she was a child, she was an incorrigible
handful who would fly into rages and strong-arm
others into doing what she wanted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her grandfather taught her in the Kongo Yaegaki
style to help her control her emotions—and
suppress the "blaze fierce" of her anger with
"water still."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She aims to put this philosophy to good use and
seeks glory in the world of racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After all, her grandparents helped her so much,
and she wants to show them how much she's
grown. Intent on repaying them, Yaeno Muteki
begins her battle!
